name: Travel Rewards Credit Card for Students
perks: 1.5 points per $1 spent on all purchases with no limit
25,000 bonus points after $1,000 in purchases in first 90 days (worth $250 in travel)
0% intro APR for 15 billing cycles on purchases and balance transfers
Points redeemable for statement credit toward travel, dining, and more
Preferred Rewards program available after graduation
Free access to FICO credit score
Designed for students with limited credit history
drawbacks: Points worth exactly 1 cent each (no aspirational value)
Bonus points not as high as non-student travel cards
No transfer partners (no airline or hotel programs)
